variants.title: HiFi Filter OS 601 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-5317
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OS 601 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SA-5317. Easy to install and replace, the OS 601 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AS2264 Air Filter/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-5317
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AS2264 air oil separator prevents oil build-up, protects against detonation, and minimizes oil loss which equates to reduced maintenance and more consistent performance.
